| [alpha\_bench\_tool.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/src/tools/alpha_bench_tool.py "alpha_bench_tool.py") | [alpha\_bench\_tool.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/src/tools/alpha_bench_tool.py "alpha_bench_tool.py") | [security: address all 10 findings from external audit (issue](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/a68c6852d843ded0118f0a289dcbe3e8eebd7a39 "security: address all 10 findings from external audit (issue #476)  Implements VT-001 through VT-010 from the 2026-07-10 external security audit (Trivy/Semgrep/ZAP/Gitleaks/pip-audit against a real deployment):  - VT-001 (Critical): AST hardening in backtest/runner.py rejects   network/subprocess/eval/os.environ/unsafe-open calls reachable from   generated SignalEngine method bodies (previously only checked   top-level statements). Defense-in-depth: ephemeral per-run HOME,   RLIMIT_AS/NOFILE caps, best-effort UID-drop to a new vibe-sandbox   user (currently inert under Docker's cap model - see session doc;   accepted as documented residual gap, primary AST defense unaffected). - VT-002: multi-stage Dockerfile split so build-essential never   reaches the runtime image. - VT-003: SSE auth moved from a long-lived API key in the URL query   string to short-lived single-use tickets; access-log redaction for   any remaining query secrets. - VT-004: agent/.env split-brain fixed (bind mount + atomic 0600   writes) between docker-compose and Web UI settings writes. - VT-005: /correlation now requires auth + per-IP rate limit; generic   exceptions no longer leak raw text to clients. - VT-006: CSP-Report-Only + security headers middleware; Google Fonts   replaced with self-hosted @fontsource packages. - VT-007: docker-compose hardening (cap_drop ALL + minimal cap_add,   no-new-privileges, read_only rootfs, resource limits). - VT-008: /health split into /live (liveness) and /ready (real   provider-config readiness check); /health kept as a compat alias. - VT-009: base images pinned by digest, GitHub Actions pinned by   commit SHA, dependabot.yml added, hash-verified requirements-lock.txt   now actually wired into the Docker build via --require-hashes. - VT-010: universe-panel pickle cache sidecar upgraded from an   unkeyed SHA-256 (forgeable by anyone with cache-dir write access)   to a keyed HMAC.  Implemented via a 5-parcel Workflow (file-disjoint, independent adversarial verification per parcel, then a holistic final audit). The final audit caught a real regression (CI env-var-gate violation) and confirmed a dependency-pinning gap, both fixed and re-verified here, including a latent transitive-dependency bug the fix surfaced (smartmoneyconcepts<0.0.27 pulls an unbuildable zigzag package) - see docs/sessions/2026-07-13_session_vt476_security_hardening.md (local, gitignored) for full evidence trail.  Full suite: 5191 passed, 6 pre-existing/environmental failures (unchanged from main). Docker build + hardened compose boot verified end-to-end.") | [alpha\_zoo\_tool.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/src/tools/alpha_zoo_tool.py "alpha_zoo_tool.py") | [alpha\_zoo\_tool.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/src/tools/alpha_zoo_tool.py "alpha_zoo_tool.py") | [feat(alpha-zoo): bench runner + CLI + Web UI + 4 REST routes](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/9854035420a2919e05bbe98974db7a38be2f455e "feat(alpha-zoo): bench runner + CLI + Web UI + 4 REST routes  End-to-end product surfaces over the factor framework: a CLI for power users, an agent-tool layer for natural-language workflows, a REST + SSE API for browser clients, and the Web UI itself.  CLI (vibe-trading alpha <subcommand>) - list / show / bench / compare / export-manifest with security   guards (path-traversal, alpha_id allowlist before any FS read) - agent/cli.py wired (7-line glue), all logic in cli_handlers.py - alpha bench: requires --zoo (or --yes); drives bench_runner with   an on_progress callback feeding a Rich Progress bar; prints ETA   banner; emits stderr summary \"✓ Bench complete. N tested, M   skipped. Report: <path>\"; returns exit 1 on status != ok - alpha list: --limit N / --json flags; TTY next-step hints - alpha show: --brief; Syntax(word_wrap=True) so source survives   narrow terminals - TUSHARE_TOKEN errors append a 3-step fix banner - ConstantInputWarning silenced at module level  Agent tools (auto-discovered via BaseTool.__subclasses__) - AlphaZooTool: list_alphas / get_alpha / health - AlphaBenchTool: orchestrator with Jinja2 autoescape HTML report +   strict CSP meta. Module-level run_alpha_bench() reused by CLI  Universe loader (agent/src/tools/alpha_bench_tool.py) - csi300 → Tushare index_weight + pro.daily, in-house panel build   because the bundled tushare loader drops `amount`. Parallel fetch   via ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=4); cache at ~/.vibe-trading/   cache/<universe>_<start>_<end>.pkl with sha256 sidecar integrity   guard - sp500 → Wikipedia constituent list (UA-spoofed; bare pd.read_html   returns 403) → yfinance loader; surfaces survivorship_bias=True   in panel._meta because the constituent set is point-in-NOW - btc-usdt → bundled okx loader; fails fast (ValueError) on single-   asset cross-sectional IC degeneracy  REST API (agent/src/api/alpha_routes.py + agent/api_server.py +6 lines) - GET /alpha/list?zoo=&theme=&universe=&limit= — paginated catalogue - GET /alpha/{alpha_id} — meta + source code via Registry.get_source - POST /alpha/bench — kicks off asyncio.create_task running the   bench in asyncio.to_thread; in-memory job state with threading.Lock   + 1-hour TTL + asyncio.Semaphore(2) concurrency cap (429 on   saturation) - GET /alpha/bench/{job_id}/stream — Server-Sent Events emitting   progress / result / done / error events. Heartbeat \": ping\n\n\"   every 15s so reverse proxies don't close idle streams. Unexpected   exceptions are sanitised to \"internal error; see server logs\"  Web UI (frontend/src/pages/AlphaZoo.tsx ~950 LOC, 3 sub-views) - Browse: 4 gradient zoo cards (qlib158 / Kakushadze 101 / gtja191 /   academic) + filter bar (zoo, theme, universe, id substring) +   paginated table (50 rows + Load more) - Detail: formula_latex in <code> block (no MathJax under strict   CSP); metadata table; collapsible <details> source code; \"Run   bench\" CTA prefilled - Bench: form → SSE-streamed progress bar + currently-computing   alpha id → Alive/Reversed/Dead/Skipped stat cards + Top-5-by-IR +   Most-Reversed tables + by-theme echarts bar chart - New /alpha-zoo route triplet wired in router.tsx; Layout.tsx   nav entry with the Layers icon - Raw EventSource pattern (useSSE hard-codes agent-stream event   types and would drop our progress/result/done/error) - a11y: htmlFor/id pairs on every label, aria-hidden on decorative   lucide icons, sr-only table caption, CategoryBadge component - BTC universe fail-fast surfaces as inline form error with hint   to try sp500/csi300  Registry singleton via get_default_registry() so API requests don't each pay the 452-module AST scan. compute_ic_series vectorised via pandas corrwith(method=\"spearman\"); ~5-10x speedup, numerically identical to the prior scipy loop within 1.1e-16.  VWAP 千元 fix: empirical Tushare probe against 000001.SZ confirmed daily.amount is in 千元 (not raw CNY). base.vwap(EQUITY_CN) now does safe_div(amount * 1000.0, volume * 100.0 + 1.0) — previously ~1/1000th of true vwap. Affects factors mixing vwap with price additively (alpha101_093 etc.).  969 tests pass; registry health 452 loaded / 0 failed; CI grep gates green; TypeScript clean.") | 2 months agoMay 17, 2026 |
| [autopilot\_tool.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/src/tools/autopilot_tool.py "autopilot_tool.py") | [autopilot\_tool.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/src/tools/autopilot_tool.py "autopilot_tool.py") | [feat(autopilot): scaffold signal engine + auto-link backtest metrics …](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/1b71b1388908f4734688b13640ded37fa22c0948 "feat(autopilot): scaffold signal engine + auto-link backtest metrics (Phase 3) (#267)  Two new tools close the hypothesis -> backtest -> evidence loop that Phase 1+2 left half-wired:  - scaffold_signal_engine: writes a contract-correct code/signal_engine.py   stub (no-arg SignalEngine, generate(self, data_map) -> dict of pd.Series)   with a runnable flat-signal default and the hypothesis signal_definition   embedded as a docstring. Eliminates the runner's most common pre-flight   validation failure. Refuses to overwrite an existing engine unless   overwrite=true. - link_autopilot_backtest: reads run_card.json metrics from a run dir and   links them to the hypothesis via link_backtest in one step, instead of   making the agent hand-extract the metrics dict.  Both resolve run_dir through safe_run_dir, inheriting the allowed-run-root boundary (fail-closed on path traversal). Adds 12 tests, including a check that the generated stub satisfies the backtest runner contract by importing it and running generate().  Signed-off-by: Robin1987China <fanrenzhige@163.com> Co-authored-by: Robin1987China <fanrenzhige@163.com>") | last monthJun 20, 2026 |

| [factor\_analysis\_tool.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/src/tools/factor_analysis_tool.py "factor_analysis_tool.py") | [factor\_analysis\_tool.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/src/tools/factor_analysis_tool.py "factor_analysis_tool.py") | [feat(factors): Alpha Zoo framework — registry, operators, safety gates](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/7d678aabda18c9e3094e0973763e9c1360817599 "feat(factors): Alpha Zoo framework — registry, operators, safety gates  New module agent/src/factors/ providing the foundation for the Alpha Zoo:  - base.py: 19 cross-sectional + time-series operators on wide   pd.DataFrame panels (rank/scale/ts_*/delta/decay_linear/signed_power/   safe_div + market-aware vwap). NaN propagates strictly; delta(d>=1)   enforced at the operator layer; no negative shifts allowed. - registry.py: AST-extracts __alpha_meta__ from each zoo .py module   without importing it; pydantic AlphaMeta (extra=\"forbid\",   frozen=True). Lazy importlib.import_module on compute(); filesystem-   loader fallback for plugin/test trees. Sanity gates reject +/-inf,   NaN ratio > 95%, and shape mismatches. - factor_analysis_core.py: IC/IR + layered backtest math extracted   from agent/src/tools/factor_analysis_tool.py so it's reusable from   CLI, bench tool, and API. - bench_runner.py: per-alpha compute → IC vs forward return →   alive/reversed/dead categorisation (mean IC > 0.02, pos_ratio >=   0.55, |t-stat| > 2). Shared by CLI driver and API worker.  Multi-factor skill gains a panel-style ZooSignalEngine.from_zoo() factory (cross-sectional standardisation + weighting + optional top-N / bottom-N long-short conversion). The legacy per-symbol example_signal_engine.py is left untouched. SKILL.md edits in multi-factor and factor-research cross-reference the new zoo.  Safety floor: - test_alpha_purity.py: AST allowlist scan of every zoo/**/*.py   module. Allowed imports: pandas, numpy, scipy.*, src.factors.base,   __future__, typing, math, dataclasses. Banned names: os/sys/   subprocess/socket/urllib/requests/httpx/pathlib/Path/open/eval/exec/   compile/__import__, plus dunder-access via getattr(_, \"__*\"),   breakpoint, input, help, memoryview, globals, locals, vars, and   the __class__/__bases__/__mro__/__globals__/__builtins__ chain.   Module-level statements limited to docstring + imports + functions   + ALPHA_ID/__alpha_meta__ assignments with literal RHS. - test_lookahead.py: 300-row synthetic panel; corrupt rows >= 270;   assert factor at probe row 260 unchanged within 1e-9. - test_base.py + test_registry.py + conftest.py with opt-in   pytest-socket integration that hard-fails outbound network during   the factors test suite. - tools/ci_grep_gates.sh: rejects yaml.load( without safe_load,   any trademarked-name leak in shipped artifacts, and any per-stock-   code data leak in wiki/**/*.{json,csv,html}.  Governance: - CONTRIBUTING.md with the Developer Certificate of Origin trailer   for community PRs and the alpha PR reviewer checklist. - NOTICE at the repo root with Apache-2.0 attribution for the   upstream qlib NOTICE and the formulas-as-mathematical-content   stance for Kakushadze / GTJA / Fama-French sources.") | 2 months agoMay 17, 2026 |
| [financial\_rigor\_tool.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/src/tools/financial_rigor_tool.py "financial_rigor_tool.py") | [financial\_rigor\_tool.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/src/tools/financial_rigor_tool.py "financial_rigor_tool.py") | [fix(tools): normalize three\_scenario growth > 1 as percent](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/a6f052bfcc5cb868480cf50af757e5f6a2f6ec6c "fix(tools): normalize three_scenario growth > 1 as percent  LLMs routinely pass '15%' as 15 instead of 0.15, which made three_scenario_valuation compound at 1500% and return absurd target prices (23.5 x 16^3 = 96256 instead of 35.74). The math was correct for the input given, but the tool silently accepted an unreasonable growth rate.  Now |growth| > 1 is treated as a percent and divided by 100, with a growth_normalized_from_percent flag and note in the result. Description also clarified ('0.15 for 15%'). Add tools/test_ci_env_var_gate.py: 18 test cases for the CI gate - Update tools/ci_grep_gates.sh to call the new env var gate - Add agent/tests/test_env_schema.py: 81 test cases covering defaults, type coercion, singleton, thread safety, bool parser - | [options\_pricing\_tool.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/src/tools/options_pricing_tool.py "options_pricing_tool.py") | [options\_pricing\_tool.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/src/tools/options_pricing_tool.py "options_pricing_tool.py") | [fix(mcp): unresolved symbols, finite options validation, row cap (](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/cdf343d74533299f3ee309d29dd2a9898036fd3e "fix(mcp): unresolved symbols, finite options validation, row cap (#120)  * fix(mcp): surface unresolved market-data symbols  A typo / wrong-suffix / delisted / no-data code vanished from get_market_data's result (the dict only held winners), so it was indistinguishable from \"no data\", and a loader exception lost every already-resolved symbol (P05).  Report any requested code that produced nothing under a reserved `_unresolved` key (additive — omitted when all codes resolve, so the all-resolved payload is byte-identical to before) and wrap the per-group loader.fetch so a blow-up is contained, not opaque. Richer per-symbol status objects are a deliberate breaking follow-up.  (cherry picked from commit eba2044e982c5d467c808bad05386de3d856d635)  * fix(tools): reject invalid analyze_options inputs  Invalid inputs (volatility<=0, spot/strike<=0, negative expiry, bad option_type) and T=0 all returned status:\"ok\" with silently wrong / zeroed Greeks, and NaN could leak into the JSON (P06).  Validate at the boundary and reject invalid inputs with an error envelope; flag the legitimate T=0 expiry as status:\"degenerate\" with a warning (intrinsic value still returned); serialize with allow_nan=False. The normal path is numerically unchanged. The Greeks-convention rework (delta=0.5 at expiry) is a larger follow-up, out of scope here.  (cherry picked from commit 823dc2382d73b97919807cf14a3644073886247d)  * fix(mcp): cap get_market_data row output  Every row of every symbol was emitted, so the canonical \"1 symbol, 1 year, daily\" request (~251 rows) breached the MCP token budget and had to spool to a file, defeating an inline data tool (P07).  Add a max_rows cap (default 250): a symbol exceeding it returns a head+tail window plus truncation metadata (rows/returned/truncated/ hint); symbols within the cap are unchanged (plain list, so small queries are byte-identical); max_rows=0 restores the unbounded legacy behavior. Columnar encoding and envelope de-duplication are broader follow-ups, out of scope here.  (cherry picked from commit 0e426b1d0523e8c8144c699f89cd4847199e6448)  * fix(options): reject nan/inf + log dropped loader  options_pricing previously accepted NaN/Inf numeric inputs and silently produced unreliable Greeks. Reject any non-finite spot, strike, expiry_days, volatility, or risk_free_rate at the validation boundary before pricing, and treat a missing result key as non-finite so a dropped field is flagged degenerate instead of defaulting to a confident 0.0.  mcp_server.get_market_data: the contained loader-failure path (P05) now logs the swallowed exception with logger.exception instead of vanishing silently; the _unresolved fallthrough is unchanged.  * fix(mcp): stride row cap, reject neg max_rows  _cap_rows previously returned a head+tail window with a synthetic {_gap: N} sentinel, hiding the middle of the series and emitting a fake non-bar record. Replace with an even-stride downsample (every step-th bar, last bar pinned) so the capped series spans the full date range with only real bars.  A negative max_rows now enforces the default cap instead of being treated as <=0 (which silently disabled the cap and returned an unbounded payload). max_rows=0 still means unbounded; the in-cap plain-list path is unchanged.") [#120](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/pull/120) [)](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/cdf343d74533299f3ee309d29dd2a9898036fd3e "fix(mcp): unresolved symbols, finite options validation, row cap (#120)  * fix(mcp): surface unresolved market-data symbols  A typo / wrong-suffix / delisted / no-data code vanished from get_market_data's result (the dict only held winners), so it was indistinguishable from \"no data\", and a loader exception lost every already-resolved symbol (P05).  Report any requested code that produced nothing under a reserved `_unresolved` key (additive — omitted when all codes resolve, so the all-resolved payload is byte-identical to before) and wrap the per-group loader.fetch so a blow-up is contained, not opaque. Richer per-symbol status objects are a deliberate breaking follow-up.  (cherry picked from commit eba2044e982c5d467c808bad05386de3d856d635)  * fix(tools): reject invalid analyze_options inputs  Invalid inputs (volatility<=0, spot/strike<=0, negative expiry, bad option_type) and T=0 all returned status:\"ok\" with silently wrong / zeroed Greeks, and NaN could leak into the JSON (P06).  Validate at the boundary and reject invalid inputs with an error envelope; flag the legitimate T=0 expiry as status:\"degenerate\" with a warning (intrinsic value still returned); serialize with allow_nan=False. The normal path is numerically unchanged. The Greeks-convention rework (delta=0.5 at expiry) is a larger follow-up, out of scope here.  (cherry picked from commit 823dc2382d73b97919807cf14a3644073886247d)  * fix(mcp): cap get_market_data row output  Every row of every symbol was emitted, so the canonical \"1 symbol, 1 year, daily\" request (~251 rows) breached the MCP token budget and had to spool to a file, defeating an inline data tool (P07).  Add a max_rows cap (default 250): a symbol exceeding it returns a head+tail window plus truncation metadata (rows/returned/truncated/ hint); symbols within the cap are unchanged (plain list, so small queries are byte-identical); max_rows=0 restores the unbounded legacy behavior. Columnar encoding and envelope de-duplication are broader follow-ups, out of scope here.  (cherry picked from commit 0e426b1d0523e8c8144c699f89cd4847199e6448)  * fix(options): reject nan/inf + log dropped loader  options_pricing previously accepted NaN/Inf numeric inputs and silently produced unreliable Greeks. Reject any non-finite spot, strike, expiry_days, volatility, or risk_free_rate at the validation boundary before pricing, and treat a missing result key as non-finite so a dropped field is flagged degenerate instead of defaulting to a confident 0.0.  mcp_server.get_market_data: the contained loader-failure path (P05) now logs the swallowed exception with logger.exception instead of vanishing silently; the _unresolved fallthrough is unchanged.  * fix(mcp): stride row cap, reject neg max_rows  _cap_rows previously returned a head+tail window with a synthetic {_gap: N} sentinel, hiding the middle of the series and emitting a fake non-bar record. Replace with an even-stride downsample (every step-th bar, last bar pinned) so the capped series spans the full date range with only real bars.  A negative max_rows now enforces the default cap instead of being treated as <=0 (which silently disabled the cap and returned an unbounded payload). max_rows=0 still means unbounded; the in-cap plain-list path is unchanged.") | 2 months agoMay 16, 2026 |

| [pattern\_tool.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/src/tools/pattern_tool.py "pattern_tool.py") | [pattern\_tool.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/src/tools/pattern_tool.py "pattern_tool.py") | [chore: cleanup pass — 3 latent bug fixes + 913 LOC net delete](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/e99444dee725370fbd16e816360e97682c61cef2 "chore: cleanup pass — 3 latent bug fixes + 913 LOC net delete  Bug fixes - CompositeEngine no longer misroutes bare Chinese-futures codes like   RB2410 to GlobalFuturesEngine. _is_china_futures moved into a shared   _market_hooks module with a case-normalized product table and a   non-CN exchange guard. 9 new regression cases (RB2410 / rb2410 /   RB2410.SHFE / CL.NYMEX / M2412.CBOT / CF2412.ICE / AU2412.COMEX /   FG2412.EUREX / bare CN-collision still routes Chinese). - Session FTS5 indexes now persist timestamps so cross-session search   can sort by date. Same path also fixes a re-upsert that was   wall-clocking every session's started_at on title-rename. - Vite dev-mode proxy gained the missing /alpha entry; AlphaZoo page   resolves on npm run dev.  Cleanup - Deleted swarm/api_models.py + swarm/mailbox.py + SwarmDashboard.tsx   (dead modules / orphaned UI after swarm-via-agent flow). - Deleted SessionService.resume_attempt + get_attempts + get_attempt   + SessionStore.list_attempts + Attempt.mark_waiting_user chain   (half-baked human-in-the-loop from initial commit). - Deleted ChatLLM.achat (async sibling never called) and   _extract_balanced_json (only-tested helper). - Deleted american_exercise_value in options_portfolio.py   (driver inlines bs_price logic). - Deleted _compute_ic_series_reference in factor_analysis_core.py   (kept-as-reference, no callers). - Collapsed MEMORY_TYPES duplication between cli.py and   memory.persistent; restored set-equality invariant assert. - Deleted runSwarm (~197 LOC), swarmDash state, swarmCancelRef   write-only ref (orphaned by new agent-driven swarm flow). - Dropped 76 unused 'vw = vwap(...)' boilerplate lines across   gtja191 alphas + their now-unused vwap imports. - Cleared 11 F401 unused-import sites in tools/, agent/, providers/.  Test infrastructure - test_e2e_harness_v2.py (real-LLM e2e) gated behind   VIBE_TRADING_RUN_LIVE_E2E so CI no longer flips shape based on   env-key presence. CI workflow now has explicit --ignore. - test_auto_compact_with_long_history: monkeypatch TOKEN_THRESHOLD so   the test deterministically triggers compact instead of relying on   unrelated LLM behaviour. - test_compact_tool_explicit: assertion corrected — compact tool is   special-cased in loop._process_tool_calls and does NOT emit   tool_call events. Assert on the 'compact' event instead. - TestSwarmE2E: per-test @pytest.mark.timeout overrides matching the   internal 300s poll deadlines; cancel test now polls for terminal   state instead of fixed sleep(3).  Tooling - ruff per-file-ignores for factors/zoo/** (3783 → 0 F401 noise);   F841 stays active in zoo to catch real formula bugs. - frontend tsconfig: noUnusedLocals + noUnusedParameters as   regression guards. - highlight.js hoisted to direct dependency (was transitive via   rehype-highlight). - Vite proxy: dropped unused /run, /skills, /health, /api, /system;   added /alpha.  Annotations - direction parameter renamed to _direction in 6 calc_commission   signatures (reserved for future borrow-fee asymmetry). - _MARGIN_PER_CONTRACT in global_futures.py annotated as reference   data. - Backtest engines' _calc_pct_change variants cross-reference each   other in docstrings.  Docs - 2026-05-18 news entry added to README.md / README_zh.md /   README_ja.md / README_ko.md / README_ar.md; 2026-05-15 entry   rolled into the Earlier news <details>. - Contributors heading: v0.1.7 cycle → v0.1.8 cycle in all 5   READMEs.  126 files changed, +363 / -1276.") | 2 months agoMay 18, 2026 |

Cleanup - Deleted swarm/api_models.py + swarm/mailbox.py + SwarmDashboard.tsx   (dead modules / orphaned UI after swarm-via-agent flow). - Deleted SessionService.resume_attempt + get_attempts + get_attempt   + SessionStore.list_attempts + Attempt.mark_waiting_user chain   (half-baked human-in-the-loop from initial commit). - Deleted ChatLLM.achat (async sibling never called) and   _extract_balanced_json (only-tested helper). - Deleted american_exercise_value in options_portfolio.py   (driver inlines bs_price logic). - Deleted _compute_ic_series_reference in factor_analysis_core.py   (kept-as-reference, no callers). - Collapsed MEMORY_TYPES duplication between cli.py and   memory.persistent; restored set-equality invariant assert. - Deleted runSwarm (~197 LOC), swarmDash state, swarmCancelRef   write-only ref (orphaned by new agent-driven swarm flow). - Dropped 76 unused 'vw = vwap(...)' boilerplate lines across   gtja191 alphas + their now-unused vwap imports. - Cleared 11 F401 unused-import sites in tools/, agent/, providers/.  Test infrastructure - test_e2e_harness_v2.py (real-LLM e2e) gated behind   VIBE_TRADING_RUN_LIVE_E2E so CI no longer flips shape based on   env-key presence. CI workflow now has explicit --ignore. - test_auto_compact_with_long_history: monkeypatch TOKEN_THRESHOLD so   the test deterministically triggers compact instead of relying on   unrelated LLM behaviour. - test_compact_tool_explicit: assertion corrected — compact tool is   special-cased in loop._process_tool_calls and does NOT emit   tool_call events. Assert on the 'compact' event instead. - TestSwarmE2E: per-test @pytest.mark.timeout overrides matching the   internal 300s poll deadlines; cancel test now polls for terminal   state instead of fixed sleep(3).  Tooling - ruff per-file-ignores for factors/zoo/** (3783 → 0 F401 noise);   F841 stays active in zoo to catch real formula bugs. - frontend tsconfig: noUnusedLocals + noUnusedParameters as   regression guards. - highlight.js hoisted to direct dependency (was transitive via   rehype-highlight). - Vite proxy: dropped unused /run, /skills, /health, /api, /system;   added /alpha.  Annotations - direction parameter renamed to _direction in 6 calc_commission   signatures (reserved for future borrow-fee asymmetry). - _MARGIN_PER_CONTRACT in global_futures.py annotated as reference   data. - Backtest engines' _calc_pct_change variants cross-reference each   other in docstrings. | [trading\_connector\_tool.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/src/tools/trading_connector_tool.py "trading_connector_tool.py") | [trading\_connector\_tool.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/src/tools/trading_connector_tool.py "trading_connector_tool.py") | [fix(trading): treat zero quantity/notional as unset in trading\_place\_…](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/8d50ef32d115662077208d281015f6eacc245611 "fix(trading): treat zero quantity/notional as unset in trading_place_order  The agent's trading_place_order tool could never place a share-quantity order. LLMs routinely populate both sizing fields, leaving the unused one at 0. _num_or_none(0) returned 0.0, so both quantity and notional reached the connector as non-None and place_order rejected the request with \"provide exactly one of quantity or notional\".  A zero order size is never valid, so coerce a 0 quantity/notional to None, preserving the \"exactly one of quantity/notional\" contract regardless of which field the model over-fills.  Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>") | last weekJul 6, 2026 |

Fix TIMEOUT_SECONDS CLI display default (2400 -> 120, matching runtime) - Fix MAX_RETRIES CLI display default ('(not set)' -> 2, matching runtime) - Fix VIBE_TRADING_API_KEY server-side alias (security.py now resolves it via get_env_config().api.api_auth_key) -
